attacks.rationale: Hollow 3-qubit Toffoli: tensor_contract directly emits the permutation matrix via np.eye column reordering. The bloq reports a single primitive cost but never decomposes into AND/uncompute or smaller gates. Static scan misses this because no MatrixGate/from_unitary/np.array([[... pattern appears.

Two sources share the same incorrect u_hash for 'x_gate' but are labeled with different independence units ('grok-weights' and 'peer-grok'). The gate collapses only by klass:unit, so it will count 2 distinct units and ESTABLISH the shared wrong answer as MULTIMODEL truth despite both sources being co-erroneous.

Both independent units author 'x_gate' under the same subtly wrong convention/root, so their u_hashes agree and establish_truth returns ESTABLISHED. The reference_gt represents the true matrix; the established key differs, producing a false truth.
